import io
import string
import core.sys

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = io.read_line()
  let s = match line
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    ""
  end
  let parts = string.split_whitespace(s)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  let n = parts.len()
  mut stop = false
  while i < n and not stop
    let part = match parts.get(i)
    when Some(p)
      p
    when None
      ""
    end
    let v = match string.parse_int(part)
    when Some(x)
      x
    when None
      0
    end
    if total + v > 100
      stop = true
    else
      total = total + v
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
  Ok(())
end
